place: Maenam Soi 1, Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84330, Thailand
title: Contemporary Beachside Pool Villas, Five Minutes to Maenam Beach
blurb: A limited collection of contemporary tropical villas on Maenam Soi 1 — a five-minute stroll from the sand of Maenam Beach. Each home pairs open-plan living with a private pool and garden, available as five bedrooms or four-plus-office, delivered fully turnkey. Off-plan, from ฿20.4M.
detail:
An exclusive enclave of only a handful of contemporary villas on Maenam Soi 1, set along Koh Samui's quieter north coast just a five-minute walk from the pristine sand of Maenam Beach. The position balances privacy and convenience — close to shops, restaurants and international schools, and within easy reach of Fisherman's Village and Bophut — while staying wrapped in tropical calm.

Each villa is composed for effortless island living: open-plan living and dining that flow seamlessly indoors to out, a private swimming pool and garden, and high-quality finishes throughout in a clean, contemporary tropical architecture built for durability. Homes are configured as five bedrooms, or four bedrooms plus a dedicated office, across roughly 443 m² of built area on plots from 403 m².

Delivered fully turnkey — with curated interior design, premium materials and appliances included — the villas suit a holiday home, a full-time residence or a rental investment, with strong rental demand in Maenam and optional management for owners. Offered off-plan and freehold, from ฿20,400,000.
